variants.title: Fleetguard HF6066 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P551196
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF6066 hydraulic cartridge filter is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.

variants.title: Donaldson P551196 Hydraulic Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P551196 Hydraulic Cartridge offers superior filtration performance, effectively removing contaminants from hydraulic fluids. Its high-capacity design helps maintain fluid cleanliness and system efficiency. Constructed from durable materials, this hydraulic cartridge is suitable for a wide range of industrial and heavy-duty hydraulic systems.
